title: Fermented Crunchy Korean Spaghetti Pasta
description: A Korean-inspired spaghetti dish featuring a fermented sauce, crunchy texture, and low-fat content. Enjoy as a solo dinner option.

ingredients.name: Spaghetti
ingredients.notes: preferably made from brown rice flour

instructions: Combine gochujang, fermented kimchi, ginger, and garlic in a blender and blend until smooth.
Transfer the blended mixture to a saucepan and cook over medium heat until hot and bubbly.
Meanwhile, cook the spaghetti according to package instructions until al dente.
Heat sesame oil in a separate pan over medium heat and add the cooked spaghetti, tossing to coat with oil.
Using a fork, mash the cooked spaghetti to create a crunchy texture.
Transfer the spaghetti to a cedar plank and top with the fermented sauce.
Drizzle with additional sesame oil if desired.
